title: [M5 Cardputer Adv] I would like to announce... Meshcute WiFi / Bluetooth / LoRa scanner

messages.author: MadScientist
messages.text: I have created "Meshcute". It runs on a M5 Cardputer Adv. It has three screens for Bluetooth, WiFi and LoRa. It displays signal strengths and names of found entities. It has been created for Meshcore meetings where you want to do a quick first diagnosis when a participant has a device that does not work. Is it visible in any of the three categories? With which strength? It's a first step. Maybe somebody likes it. Feedback welcome on the GitHub page. PS: GNU General Public License v3.0! https://github.com/MadScientistCH/meshcute (edited)
